name: 2G/3G Shutdown Regression Detection
trigger: Active test detects voice or data failure on 4G in cells where 2G/3G was recently decommissioned.

autonomyLevels.L1: Engineer reviews drive test results, raises re-planning ticket for affected cells.
autonomyLevels.L2: System re-enables legacy coverage in affected micro-zones pending fix.
autonomyLevels.L3: Automated re-planning triggered. Coverage obligation report generated.
autonomyLevels.L4: Network autonomously adjusts coverage parameters to compensate. Regulatory evidence logged.

economicOutcome: Coverage obligation breach prevented. Regulatory fine risk eliminated.
economicCalculation: Average NRA fine for coverage breach in EU: €500K–€2M. Cost of continuous active testing: <€200K/year.
combinationUpgrade: Add passive probe (RADCOM ACE) to identify which subscriber types were affected during the regression window — M2M, IoT, consumer — enabling targeted remediation.
